---
title: "{{< meta gh.repo >}}: {{< meta tagline >}}"
---

{{< include /docs/includes/_badges.qmd >}}

<!-- TODO: Fill in this description -->

This is a template for creating a new repository for... Use this
template to quickly get started with... as well as having the
infrastructure configuration files to make developing and building...
easier.

## Features

<!-- TODO: List features here -->

## Want to contribute?

We would love your feedback or contributions! Head over to our
[GitHub repository]({{< meta links.github >}}) to share your ideas or
contribute code. Your input makes us better!

::: content-hidden
### Contributors

{{< include /docs/includes/_contributors.qmd >}}
:::

## Licensing

This project is licensed under the [MIT License](/LICENSE.md).
